runtime: isolated vLLM 0.24.0 telemetry runtime, TP2, greedy, logprobs 5

tasks.cell_mix: 12 tasks per cell x 4 strata x 4 families (div_exact, json_digits, mod_arith, sub_mixed)
tasks.disjointness: prompt-string exclusion vs all prior local task sets including the M36T development tasks

power.predeclared_rule: stop before capture if expected positives < 24

detector.label: needs_more_than_512_tokens := not verified-complete within 512 tokens (outcome class != 1)

tool_policy.budget_rule: k = ceil(0.6989 x N_sealed_alive_at_256); identical k for every routed arm
tool_policy.tool: deterministic solver (the family generator's exact computation); a tool result replaces the model result only when the verifier accepts the tool result; no arm may turn a verified-correct answer into a failing one

statistics.confidence: 95% percentile intervals; hypotheses require lower bounds strictly > 0

hypotheses.T-H1: full_prefix_telemetry improves balanced accuracy AND average precision over metadata_plus_logprob on the sealed set (both paired 95% lower bounds > 0)
hypotheses.T-H2: at identical k, full_jlens_policy improves verified success over metadata_policy AND count_matched_random (both paired lower bounds > 0)
hypotheses.T-H3: full_jlens_policy non-inferior to long_decode_2048 within absolute 0.02 verified success AND paired model-output-token saving lower bound > 0

statistics.stop_rules: no tuning on sealed outcomes; scoped conclusion committed after the single evaluation; failed hypotheses reported as failed

privacy_check_status: aggregate manifest only; tasks, rows, and per-task predictions private
